When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections  or sub -sections have been updated.   The f irst column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Underpinning Information Document (QUID) for ARCTIC_ANALYSISFORECAST_PHY_ICE_002_011, detailing the validation and production system description of Arctic monitoring forecast products.
